hero.title: Artificial intelligence platforms for tomorrow's organizations.
hero.subtitle: CivicAI develops AI platforms that help businesses, public organizations and institutions automate their operations, govern their data and accelerate their digital transformation.

platforms.title: Our platforms
platforms.subtitle: Modular, scalable and integrated solutions — built for organizations ready to take action.

why.title: Why CivicAI
why.subtitle: A Québec-based software publisher specializing in AI platforms for public and private organizations.
features: Connectors to existing tools (M365, SAP, Salesforce…)

vision.label: Our vision
vision.quote: We believe that artificial intelligence must become a concrete tool in service of organizations. Our mission is to create platforms that enable businesses, public institutions and organizations to better understand their data, automate their processes and make better decisions.
vision.author: CivicAI Inc. — Trois-Rivières, Québec

why.title: Why CivicAI?
why.subtitle: We are not an agency. We are a software publisher.
why.editor_body: CivicAI designs, develops and maintains its own software platforms. Our clients get a proven product, not a fragile custom project.
